news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on June 20, 2025, Trident Resources Corp. (TSX-V: ROCK) (OTCQB: TRDTF) declared the completion of a non-brokered private placement financing, amassing total gross proceeds of CAD$2,250,000. The Private Placement garnered interest from two strategic institutional investors.
news.headline: Trident Resources Corp completes $2.25M financing with 2 strategic investors in Vancouver.

news.summary: In Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, on June 20, 2025, Founder Group Limited, a prominent engineering, procurement, construction, and commissioning (EPCC) solutions provider for solar photovoltaic systems in Malaysia under the ticker NASDAQ: FGL, announced that it will remain unaffected by the U.S. Senate panel’s suggestion to gradually eliminate solar power tax credits by 2028. The company assures its investors that this proposed change will not have an impact on its operations, indicating stability and confidence in its future prospects.
news.headline: Founder Group reassures investors that proposed U.S. wind down of solar tax credits by 2028 won't impact the company.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, Saratoga Investment Corp., listed on NYSE as SAR, announced their upcoming financial report for the quarter ending May 31, 2025. The report is scheduled to be released on July 8, 2025, after the market closes. A conference call to review these financial results will take place on July 9, 2025. Specifics for the conference call will be shared closer to the date.
news.headline: Saratoga Investment Corp (NYSE:SAR) to report fiscal Q1 2026 financial results on July 8, 2025, with a conference call on July 9.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, in Frøya, it was referenced that Kaldvík AS made a stock exchange announcement on June 4, 2025. The announcement detailed a request to hold an extraordinary general meeting to discuss a proposal for initiating an investigation. The Company's initiative aims to address certain matters through the meeting, signifying an important step in their corporate governance. The announcement underscores the significance of this request and sets the stage for potential changes within the organization.
news.headline: Kaldvík AS to hold extraordinary general meeting on 20 June 2025 to consider opening an investigation.

news.summary: ENGLEWOOD, Colorado - Liberty Broadband Corporation disclosed today that as part of the forthcoming spin-off of its wholly owned subsidiary, GCI Liberty, Inc., the Board of Directors has set a record date for the distribution of the GCI Group common stock. The record date is June 30, 2025, at 5:00 p.m., New York City time. Liberty Broadband’s stock exchange symbols are Nasdaq: LBRDA, LBRDK, and LBRDP.
news.headline: Liberty Broadband sets June 30, 2025, as the record date for the spin-off of GCI Liberty Inc., distributing GCI Group shares.

news.summary: Dublin - A recent report on the Netherlands prepaid card and digital wallet market indicates significant growth potential. The market is projected to increase by 7.5% annually, reaching an estimated value of US$8.25 billion by 2025. Between 2020-2024, the market experienced strong growth with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 10.4%. This positive trajectory showcases a promising outlook for the prepaid card and digital wallet industry in the country.
news.headline: Netherlands prepaid card and digital wallet market to grow by 7.5% annually, reaching US$8.25 billion in 2025.

news.summary: The Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) has initiated a fresh project aimed at enhancing the American air traffic control system. Numerous companies stand to benefit from a portion of the substantial investment exceeding billions of dollars. This move by the FAA is set to expedite essential upgrades in air traffic control technology. Investors are keen to know which companies will be supplying the technology for these vital improvements.
news.headline: FAA expedites upgrade of US air traffic control system, billions in spending to be divided among multiple companies.

news.summary: Recently, the biotech company KalVista saw a significant increase in its stock value due to its efforts to revolutionize treatment for patients with Hereditary Angioedema (HAE). The company's focus on addressing this rare but life-threatening disease has garnered attention from investors. This news was featured in an article by Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: KalVista Pharma rising due to efforts to revolutionize treatment for HAE patients, biotech stock soaring.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, Gaithersburg-headquartered Emergent BioSolutions Inc. (NYSE: EBS) revealed its inclusion in the Russell 3000® Index. This change will take effect post the closing of the U.S. markets on June 27, 2025, marking a significant milestone for the company during the annual reconstitution of the Russell U.S. stock indexes.
news.headline: Emergent BioSolutions Inc. (NYSE: EBS) added to Russell 3000® Index on June 27, 2025 after US market close.

news.summary: Many prominent companies like Meta, Amazon, and Microsoft are refraining from adding Bitcoin to their treasuries despite its surge in value. These corporations have chosen to prioritize stability over the risks associated with investing in cryptocurrency.
news.headline: Meta, Amazon, and Microsoft reject Bitcoin for corporate treasury due to volatility, despite its surge.

news.summary: The cryptocurrency market is currently experiencing stability with a positive trend, driven by ongoing institutional buying, strategic initiatives by the U.S. and El Salvador regarding Bitcoin reserves, and the anticipation surrounding an upcoming Bitcoin options expiry. The current prices of major cryptocurrencies are as follows: Bitcoin ($106,035.22, +1%), Ethereum ($2,552.86, +0.8%), Solana ($148.49, +1.7%), XRP ($2.17, +0.7%), Dogecoin ($0.1707, +0.9%), and Shiba Inu ($0.00001177, +1.5%). Important statistics highlight a 27.8% decline in large transaction volumes for Bitcoin and a 17.2% decrease for Ethereum. Additionally, daily active addresses for both cryptocurrencies saw a reduction of 2.2% and 7.2%, respectively. In the past 24 hours, 65,828 traders were liquidated, resulting in total liquidations amounting to $130.69 million. Net inflows data from SoSoValue indicates... More details available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Crypto market stable with bullish tone driven by institutional accumulation, Bitcoin reserve initiatives from U.S. and El Salvador. Bitcoin at $106,035, Ethereum at $2,552, XRP at $2.17, Dogecoin at $0.1707. Bitcoin & Ethereum's transaction volume down. 65,828 traders liquidated in past 24 hrs - total $130.69M.

news.summary: A recent report titled "NCM for Aviation Batteries Market - A Global and Regional Analysis: Focus on Product, Application, and Country Analysis - Analysis and Forecast, 2025-2034" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This report highlights the utilization of NCM (Nickel Cobalt Aluminum) batteries in the aviation sector, specifically in electric aircraft and drones. NCM batteries are preferred for their high energy density and thermal stability. The analysis covers the global and regional market trends, with a focus on product types, applications, and country-specific insights. This report provides valuable forecasts and insights for the period from 2025 to 2034.
news.headline: Global analysis on NCM for Aviation Batteries Market 2025-2034 featuring key players like Xiamen Tungsten, Samsung, LG, SK Innovation, shows high energy density and thermal stability for electric aircraft and drones.

news.summary: Representative Brad Sherman alleged that the owners of TikTok attempted to influence President Trump by acquiring his official meme coin.
news.headline: TikTok denies $300 million bribe claim by Congressman Sherman regarding Trump meme coin acquisition.

news.summary: KB Home has launched its latest community in Orting, Washington, underscoring the company’s commitment to building strong relationships. The grand opening of this development signals KB Home's expansion in the sought-after area of Orting.
news.headline: KB Home opens new community in Orting, Washington, enhancing the area. #BuiltOnRelationships.

news.summary: Los Angeles-based KB Home has achieved a top ranking in customer satisfaction, with record-high scores highlighting its dedication to fostering strong relationships with customers. The company’s exceptional performance underscores its commitment to ensuring customer happiness, solidifying its reputation as a leader in the industry.
news.headline: KB Home reaches #1 ranking with record-high scores, showing dedication to customer satisfaction. #Business #KBHome

news.summary: To gain insight into the factors influencing the oil market and potential economic vulnerabilities, MM recently spoke with Rory Johnston, an oil market analyst at Commodity Context. Johnston, who closely monitors these developments, shared his expertise on the subject.
news.headline: Oil market analyst highlights economic risks in Israel-Iran conflict. Expert Rory Johnston from Commodity Context shares insights.

news.summary: Encouraging Global Universities to Make a Difference on World Refugee Day On June 20, 2025, in Pasadena, California, University of the People (UoPeople), an online American university, called for action amidst the escalating global refugee crisis. UoPeople is increasing its dedication to refugee education.
news.headline: University of the People vows to enroll 35,000 refugees by 2030, calls for global support on World Refugee Day.

news.summary: In Clear Lake, Iowa on June 20, 2025, Kingland Systems revealed the appointment of George Howe as their new Partner. With over 20 years of expertise in client service and strategic advisory, George had a noteworthy tenure at Ernst & Young for 21 years prior to joining Kingland Systems.
news.headline: Kingland Systems appoints George Howe as partner, with over 2 decades of experience. Joined from Ernst & Young after 21 years.

news.summary: Today, CommScope (NASDAQ: COMM) revealed the introduction of FiberREACH™ solution and the debut of CableGuide 360™ platform in Claremont, North Carolina.
news.headline: CommScope debuts FiberREACH and CableGuide 360 for SYSTIMAX Portfolio. Includes industry-leading cabling solutions. #CommScope #FiberREACH #CableGuide360

news.summary: In Seattle, the median U.S. home-sale price surged to a record $396,500 in the four weeks ending June 15, marking a 1% increase compared to the previous year. According to a recent report from Redfin (NASDAQ: RDFN), a tech-driven real estate firm, these prices are currently at an all-time high. Despite a relatively cool spring housing market, the prices have not fully adjusted to the historical disparity between sellers and buyers in the current market. It is important to remember that sale prices tend to be seasonal and usually reach their highest points.
news.headline: U.S. home prices reach all-time high at $396,500 in June, up 1% YoY, due to seller-buyer imbalance.

news.summary: In Troy, Michigan, ZIVO Bioscience, Inc. (OTCQB: ZIVO), a company specializing in biotech and agtech research and development, has partnered with a top animal health company to further develop ZIVO's unique immune-boosting compounds for various segments of the poultry market. This collaboration aims to address substantial gaps in other markets as well, and is anticipated to grow in scope over time.
news.headline: ZIVO Bioscience partners with global animal health company to develop immune-enhancing compounds for poultry market. #collaboration #biotech

news.summary: A recent report on the Sweden Prepaid Card and Digital Wallet Market forecasts substantial growth in the sector. It is anticipated that the market will increase by 9.9% annually, reaching approximately US$ 7.17 billion by the year 2025. Between the years 2020 and 2024, the market experienced a significant upsurge, demonstrating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 13.6%. This positive trend is projected to continue in the coming years.
news.headline: Sweden's prepaid card and digital wallet market to grow 9.9% in 2025 to $7.17 billion, achieving 13.6% CAGR in 2020-2024.

news.summary: During the first quarter, The Kroger Co. reported a 3.2% increase in identical sales excluding fuel. The company achieved an operating profit of $1,322 million and earnings per share (EPS) of $1.29. Adjusted FIFO operating profit stood at $1,518 million, with adjusted EPS at $1.49. eCommerce sales showed significant growth, rising by 15%. This information was released by the company on June 20, 2025, in Cincinnati.
news.headline: Kroger's Q1 2025 results: Identical sales up 3.2%, operating profit $1.32B, EPS $1.29, eCommerce sales up 15%.

news.summary: KB Home has recently unveiled its latest community in Southeast Stockton, California. This sought-after location marks the grand opening of the new development, showcasing the company's commitment to building strong relationships with the community.
news.headline: KB Home opens new community in Southeast Stockton, California, focusing on desirable location.

news.summary: Village Caregiving (VCG), a home-care agency based in the United States, was recently recognized in the Top Workplaces 2025 in Middle Tennessee list by The Tennessean. With around 60 employees at its Nashville office, VCG secured the second position in the small-sized company category, among 55 other businesses. The company was honored with the "Doers Award" for its outstanding execution. The awards were presented at a ceremony in the evening.
news.headline: Village Caregiving in Middle TN named No. 2 in small company category among 55, with 60 employees, wins Doers Award.

news.summary: Newegg Commerce, Inc. revealed the launch of its 11th annual FantasTech Sale from July 7 to July 13. The event, which includes over 50 computer and electronics product categories, offers thousands of deals. The company, listed as NASDAQ: NEGG, emphasized the return of FantasTech Price Protection, introduced earlier this year. Customers can find products with the FantasTech Price Protection badge, granting them assurance while making purchases during this limited time period.
news.headline: Newegg's 11th FantasTech Sale offers thousands of tech deals from July 7 to 13, with Price Protection on qualifying items.

news.summary: In Salt Lake City, ReposiTrak, Inc. (NYSE: TRAK), a leading food traceability and regulatory compliance network, announced a quarterly dividend of $0.01815 per quarter ($0.0726 per share annually) for shareholders on record by June 30, 2025. Shareholders will receive the cash dividends around August 14, 2025. This dividend payment marks a continuation of ReposiTrak's successful inventory management and out-of-stock reduction SaaS platform.
news.headline: ReposiTrak, Inc. (NYSE: TRAK) declares a $0.01815 quarterly dividend, $0.0726 annually, to be paid on August 14, 2025.

news.summary: If granted approval, nirogacestat would become the sole therapy authorized in the EU for treating desmoid tumors, making it a groundbreaking development in the medical field. This decision would provide patients in the EU with a much-needed treatment option for this rare and challenging condition.
news.headline: SpringWorks Therapeutics gets positive CHMP opinion for nirogacestat for adults with desmoid tumors, potentially first EU-approved therapy.

news.summary: Today, in Dallas, on June 20, 2025, Argent Trust Company announced as Trustee of the Permian Basin Royalty Trust (NYSE: PBT) a cash distribution for holders of its units of beneficial interest. The declared amount is $0.012976 per unit, and the payment is scheduled for July 15, 2025.
news.headline: Permian Basin Royalty Trust announces June cash distribution of $0.012976 per unit, payable on July 15, 2025. #PermianBasinRoyaltyTrust
